title: DEEP Iron Furnaces
description: Adds DEEP furnace variants for the Iron Furnaces mod.
body:
Adds DEEP furnace variants for the Iron Furnaces mod.

| Furnace Tier | Fuel Yield | Speed | Block IDs |
|--------------|------------|-------|-----------|
| Lead         | 50         | 200   | 1676,1677 |
| Silver       | 150        | 100   | 1678,1679 |
| Amethyst     | 75         | 400   | 1680,1681 |

Note: Fuel Yield here is in terms of items smelt per fuel used, not in terms of time burning per fuel used

**Known bugs and issues**
None so far :3
